components.name: Display Driver
components.description: Core graphics driver. Everything else is optional; nothing works without this.

components.name: PhysX System Software
components.description: Physics runtime used by older games. Harmless to keep, safe to drop if you never play titles that use it.

components.name: HD Audio Driver
components.description: Audio over HDMI and DisplayPort. Needed if your monitor or receiver gets sound through the graphics card.

components.name: USB-C / VirtualLink Driver
components.description: Driver for the USB-C port present on some graphics cards. Useless if your card has no USB-C output.

components.name: GeForce Experience
components.description: Companion application for driver updates, per-game optimal settings, and capture tools. Optional; the display driver works without it.

components.name: Telemetry Services
components.description: Background services that report usage and diagnostic data. Not required for the driver to function.

components.name: Container Runtime Services
components.description: Host service framework used by the companion app and the driver control panel.

components.name: Shield Controller Support
components.description: Driver for the handheld console controller family. Only useful if you own one.

components.name: Stereo 3D Support
components.description: Legacy stereoscopic 3D glasses support. Deprecated; almost nobody needs this.

components.name: Notebook Optimizations
components.description: Power and display tweaks for laptops. No effect on desktop systems.
